en.name_en: Golden Dragon and Chinese Lions with Peonies
en.description_en: A carving depicting a golden dragon and Chinese lions with peonies, classified as a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at Yusenji, Nezakizawa, Tomiya.

en.name_en: Stone Statue of Lord Masamune on Horseback
en.description_en: A stone statue depicting Lord Date Masamune on horseback, classified as a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at Atago Shrine, Yaguradshita, Tomiya.

items.name: 薬師如来像・仁王像・十二神将像

en.name_romaji: Yakushi Nyorai zō, Niō zō, Jūni Shinshō zō
en.name_en: Statues of Yakushi Nyorai, the Niō Guardians, and the Twelve Heavenly Generals
en.description_en: Statues of Yakushi Nyorai, the Niō guardian kings, and the Twelve Heavenly Generals, classified as a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at Ochiai Yakushidō, Tomiya.
A stone basin at Ōshimizu, classified as a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at 1-chome Kamisakuragi.

A perpetual kagura sacred dance of the Sakaki school, classified as a folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located in the Ōkame district.

A Nambu-style kagura sacred dance of the Amatsu school, classified as a folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located in the Imaizumi district.

items.name: 亀石
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 大亀和合田二番鹿嶋天足別神社

en.description_en: The Kameishi (turtle stone), classified as a monument (historic site). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at Amatarawake Shrine, Ōkame Wagōda 2-ban, Tomiya.

items.name: 代官松
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 富谷西沢富谷中央公民館

en.description_en: The Daikan matsu (magistrate's pine tree), classified as a monument (natural monument). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at the Tomiya Central Community Center, Nishizawa, Tomiya.

items.name: かめ杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The Kame sugi (turtle cedar tree), classified as a monument (natural monument). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at 2-chome Takanomori Park.

items.name: 水芭蕉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A colony of mizubashō (Asian skunk cabbage), classified as a monument (natural monument). It is municipally designated by the city of Tomiya. Located at Ninosekihara Zaike-yama.
